title: lygisma inflexum
intro: Lygisma inflexum, commonly known as the 'beauty flower', is a type of flowering plant native to Madagascar. The health benefits of Lygisma inflexum include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. Lygisma inflexum is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its therapeutic actions, including its ability to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation. The bioactive constituents of Lygisma inflexum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
